data.description: Arts Beacon is dedicated to providing exceptional art education for our students and career advancement and opportunities for our resident artists.

body.html: Spring Session and Summer Camps enrolling now. Adult summer class registration opening April 15th.

quick_description.text: Clay Play, Painting and Drawing, Bookmaking and mixed media camps available

description.html:
This summer we are offering 4 weeks of camps for 3rd-5th graders. There are 4 different themes to choose from. Clay Play, Book Making, Painting and Drawing and Mixed Media. We will have one teacher and one assistant and the camp will be capped at 8 students for a 4/1 ratio. Campers will need to bring a lunch. All the art supplies needed and a healthy snack will be provided.

Camp runs Monday - Friday from 9-1PM.

June 10th-14th Clay Play

June 17th-21st Painting and Drawing

July 8th-12th Mixed Media (Painting, Drawing and Sculpting)

July 22nd-26th Bookmaking

cards.class_tags: 1/2 day summer camp for rising 1st-3rd graders

quick_description.text: Mixed media fun and playful art camp for our youngest students

description.html:
This summer we are offering 4 different weeks of camps for rising 1st-3rd graders. "Art Explorers" is a mixed media camp for our youngest students! Camps run from 9AM-1PM and will incorporate painting, drawing and sculpting. Each session will have different projects and themes so campers will have a different approach to art making each week of camp. We will have one teacher and one assistant and the camp will be capped at 8 students for a 4/1 ratio. Campers will need to bring a lunch. All the art supplies needed and a healthy snack will be provided.

Art Explorers will be offered

June 10th - June 14th

June 17th - June 21st

July 8th - July 12th

July 22nd - July 26th

quick_description.text: 2 hour, week long, summer intensive class for tweens

description.html:
This summer we are offering 2 weeks of summer intensives, Painting /Drawing and Sculpture, for our tween students, rising 6th-8th grades. The summer intensives will run Monday-Friday from 2-4PM. All the supplies are included. We will be exploring on observational drawing, watercolor, and acrylic painting in the Painting and Drawing intensive. And the Sculpture intensive students will learn hollow building techniques for their clay sculptural forms. Each student will be encouraged to dive into their favorite subject matter and guided to develop well thought out artworks.

Tween Clay Intensive 2-4PM June 10th-14th

Tween Painting and Drawing 2-4PM July 15th-19th

cards.class_tags: Portfolio level intensive for teens in 8th-12th grade

quick_description.text: Week long 2 hour class for Teens in Figure Drawing or Figure Sculpture

description.html:
Teen Summer Art intensives are offered for Figure drawing and Figure Sculpture this summer. These classes are is a 5 day / 2 hour portfolio building intensive classes for teens that need to develop their portfolio for college applications, and also open to teens that just want to learn how to draw and sculpt the figure. These classes will be lead by Jena Dost who has 25 years of experience drawing and sculpting the figure and is passionate about helping teens develop a strong body of work.

All of the supplies are included.

Teen Figure Sculpture June 17th-21st 2-4PM

Teen Figure Drawing July 15th-19th 2-4PM

cards.class_tags: not so beginner anymore watercolor techniques

quick_description.text: Learn how to level up your watercolor techniques! Mondays 6:30-8:30

description.html:
Splash into some intermediate watercolor techniques! In this class you will explore your personal esthetic in watercolor paintings. We will play with form, tone, and design as we delve into composition and subject matter. We will examine materials, process, and design as you grow in skill and confidence with a community of learners who are all taking the journey together. Basic drawing skills are required and some watercolor experience is preferred. 

A detailed supply list will be provided after sign up.

  • Time: Mondays 6:30-8:30
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 18-May 13th
    Summer Session enrollment opens April 15th 2024

quick_description.text: Beginning adult clay class on Wednesday 7-9PM

description.html:
Simple Forms in Clay is a beginner level clay class exploring hand-built functional pottery in a relaxed environment. Make Cups, bowls and plates and bring a creative eye to everyday objects. Tuition includes one bag of clay and all necessary supplies and firing fees.

Students enrolled in this class are also eligible to come to open studio time throughout the semester. Open studio is available on Sundays from 10-2:00PM.

  • Time: Wednesdays 7-9PM
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 20-May 15th
    Summer Session enrollment opens April 15th 2024

quick_description.text: Intermediate adult clay class on Tuesdays 6:30-8:30

description.html:
Get wild and wacky with clay! This is an intermediate level clay class that will bring some zest into your sculptural and functional clay forms. In this class we will explore some fun and funky sculptural forms while exploring underglaze and underglaze transfers, and zesty glaze combinations.

Students enrolled in this class are also eligible to come to open studio time throughout the session. Open studio is available on Sundays from 10-2:00PM.

Tuition includes 1 bag of clay and all necessary supplies and firing fees.

  • Time: Tuesdays 6:30-8:30
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 19-May 14th
    Summer Session enrollment opens April 15th 2024

cards.class_tags: Playful, clay, drawing, painting expression class

quick_description.text: Play with different media to find your favorite! Tuesdays 6:30-8:30

description.html:
This class is a beginning level, exploratory class that uses a variety of mediums to help each artist find their own best path of expression. We'll explore clay, collage, fiber arts, drawing and painting. Each class will explore how different materials give us a different doorway into creation. We'll get familiar with a variety of media and techniques, becoming more aware of what each medium offers, and utilize playfulness and experimentation to allow a more open ended form of creation. Ultimately this class is useful for students that want to try new mediums or are hoping to get more clarity on which mediums best serve their artistic interest.

Most supplies included. You will need a mixed media sketchbook.

  • Time: Tuesdays 6:30-8:30PM
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 19-May 14th
    Summer Session enrollment opens April 15th 2024

quick_description.text: Let loose and play, experiment and discover your expression! Mondays 6:30-8:30

description.html:
A loose experimental class for learning how to engage with colors confidently in your drawing and develop an understanding for how and why you like to use them. This will be a class rooted in play, non judgment and trying to find expression from your unique voice. Watercolor can be an expansive medium and a great base for playing and learning skills to take onto oils or acrylics. We will learn basic perspective tools, build skills to understand how to work with color and come up with a self directed project.

A detailed supply list will be provided.

  • Time: Mondays 6:30-8:30PM
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 18-May 13th

cards.class_tags: Start here on your creative journey!

quick_description.text: Drawing is the foundation to all of our other classes! Offered Thursdays 6:30-8:30

description.html:
This class is for anyone who would like to explore the basics of drawing! Drawing is the structure beneath almost any creative endeavor, it’s an incredible meditative tool and is deeply grounding. This is a perfect class for beginners to start to find some tools as well as for more seasoned drawers to have a space to remember the basics and start fresh again. 

Some supplies included. A small, detailed supply list will be sent after sign up.

  • Time: Thursdays  6:30-8:30PM
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 21-May 16th
    Summer Session enrollment opens April 15th 2024

cards.class_tags: Kids 1st-3rd grade - offered the same time as the Owls Art Group!

quick_description.text: Playful art class offered on Tuesdays or Thursdays 3:30-4:30

description.html:
Designed for kids that want to build up their confidence as artists. This drawing, painting, printmaking and sculpting class is full of experimenting, exploration and movement. We will focus on process-based art with an emphasis in exploring materials and developing a strong visual aesthetic by experimenting with color, line, texture, and 2-D and 3-D design. Students will learn to appreciate their artistic differences and celebrate their successes. Dress to get messy!

All supplies included.

  • Time: Tuesdays or Thursdays 3:30-4:30
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 18-May 123th

cards.class_tags: Kids 3rd-5th grade - offered the same time as the Butterfly Art Group!

quick_description.text: Playful art class offered on Tuesdays or Thursdays 3:30-4:30

description.html:
Drawing, painting, printmaking and clay class for 3rd-5th graders that uses a process based approach to teaching but with more emphasis on developing technique. Students will be given instruction in observational drawing, color mixing, print making and clay hand building techniques.

All Supplies included.

  • Time: Tuesdays or Thursdays 3:30-4:30
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 18th-May 23rd

Designed for grades 6th-8th. The most pivotal time in a young artists life is between the ages 11-15. Tweens get a lot of support and encouragement to take their art to the next level in a supportive environment in this class. We will be exploring observational drawing, watercolor, acrylic painting, clay sculptural and functional pottery to create amazing masterpieces! Eve will be leading the Tuesday class and Karissa will be leading the Wednesday class. Send us an email at contact@artsbeacon.com if you would like your tween to participate in both classes for a 10% discount.

All supplies included

  • Time: Tuesdays 5-6:00 PM 
    Now Enrolling for Spring Session 4 March 19-May 14th

title.text: Stay informed about studio events or class changes!

body.html:
Our Gallery is open on Sundays 10-2PM

City Life - Moments of Wonder in Atlanta - Shannon Kelley Solo Show -Opening Feb 16th 6-9PM

image_captions.text: I think I have found my inner artist using charcoal... I would have never known if it hadn't been for Jena.
"I ❤️ Arts Beacon. I don’t consider myself ‘arty’ but Jena made it awesome - her vibe of relaxed, cheerful guidance encouraged me to have a wonderful time."
"I absolutely recommend Arts Beacon. Jena is wonderful with children, and I will not hesitate to send own children and clients to her!"
